title: WPC Decking & Outdoor Flooring
shortDescription: Premium WPC Decking & outdoor flooring for balconies, swimming pools, terraces, cafes, and farmhouses. Waterproof, anti-slip, UV-resistant wooden decking with zero maintenance and luxury wood aesthetics.
longDescription:
Transform outdoor spaces with premium WPC Decking and exterior flooring systems by Goals Floors. Designed for luxury balconies, swimming pool decks, rooftop terraces, garden pathways, cafes, resorts, and farmhouse landscapes, our WPC decking combines the timeless aesthetics of natural hardwood with advanced weatherproof engineering.

Manufactured using high-performance Wood Plastic Composite technology, our decking boards are completely waterproof, termite-proof, UV-resistant, and structurally stable for long-term outdoor performance. Unlike traditional wooden flooring that cracks, swells, fades, or rots under harsh weather conditions, Goals Floors WPC Decking is specifically engineered for the demanding climate conditions of Gurgaon, Delhi NCR, and across India.

The anti-slip textured surface enhances safety around swimming pools, balconies, spa areas, and outdoor walkways while maintaining a premium natural wood appearance. Installed using precision stainless steel hidden-clip systems, the flooring achieves a seamless screw-free architectural finish with proper drainage and ventilation underneath.

Ideal for luxury residential projects, commercial landscapes, hospitality spaces, cafes, rooftop lounges, and premium outdoor entertainment zones, our WPC Decking systems deliver long-lasting outdoor elegance with virtually zero maintenance requirements.

Goals Floors also supports architects, contractors, builders, and landscape designers with bulk project supply, fast delivery, and commercial installation assistance across Delhi NCR and Pan India.

features.title: All-Weather Outdoor Performance
features.description: Engineered to withstand heavy rainfall, harsh sunlight, humidity, and outdoor temperature fluctuations without swelling, cracking, or warping.

features.title: Anti-Slip Safety Surface
features.description: The textured decking surface provides superior grip, making it ideal for swimming pools, balconies, terraces, spa zones, and outdoor pathways.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite-Proof
features.description: Manufactured using advanced WPC composite technology that completely resists water absorption, termite damage, and outdoor moisture deterioration.

features.title: Natural Wood Architectural Finish
features.description: Delivers the premium appearance and texture of luxury hardwood flooring while eliminating the maintenance issues of real timber.

features.title: UV & Fade Resistant Technology
features.description: Special UV-protected surface layers help maintain long-term color stability even under continuous direct sunlight exposure.

features.title: Hidden Clip Installation System
features.description: Installed using stainless steel concealed clips for a clean screw-free finish with proper structural spacing and drainage.

applications: Commercial Rooftop Lounges & Open Deck Areas
installation: Our WPC Decking systems are installed over precision-leveled aluminum or galvanized structural frameworks that ensure proper drainage, ventilation, and long-term outdoor stability. The decking boards are secured using stainless steel concealed clips, creating a seamless architectural finish without visible screws or exposed fasteners.
maintenance: Designed for low-maintenance outdoor living, our WPC Decking requires no polishing, painting, varnishing, or waterproof coating. Routine cleaning can be performed using water, mild soap, and a soft outdoor brush to maintain its premium appearance for years.

faqs.question: What is WPC Decking and how is it better than natural wood?
faqs.answer: WPC Decking is an advanced outdoor flooring system made using Wood Plastic Composite technology. It offers the natural appearance of hardwood flooring while being completely waterproof, termite-proof, weather-resistant, and significantly lower maintenance than traditional wooden decking.

faqs.question: Can I use this around my swimming pool?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely! It has a special anti-slip surface that provides excellent grip even when wet, making it highly recommended and safe for pool areas.

faqs.question: Is WPC Decking suitable for heavy rain and outdoor weather exposure?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our premium WPC Decking boards are engineered for outdoor environments and remain structurally stable during heavy rain, humidity, and continuous weather exposure without rotting, swelling, or cracking.

faqs.question: Does the color fade in the hot summer sun?
faqs.answer: Our premium decking is UV-protected. It is specifically designed to handle the extreme heat of Delhi NCR without losing its rich, beautiful color.

faqs.question: Can I install it directly on the soil or mud in my garden?
faqs.answer: No, it cannot be placed directly on the soil. It must be installed on a strong metal frame to ensure proper water drainage and ventilation underneath the floor.

faqs.question: Do I need to polish it every year like real wood?
faqs.answer: Not at all. This is one of its biggest advantages. It requires absolutely zero polishing or painting, saving you a lot of maintenance money over the years.

faqs.question: Is it safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Yes, the core is made of a polymer composite which insects cannot eat. It is 100% termite and borer proof for its entire lifetime.

faqs.question: Does the floor get very hot in the summer?
faqs.answer: Like any outdoor surface (including tiles or real wood), it will get warm under direct afternoon sun. You can easily cool it down by splashing some water before using the space.

faqs.question: How are the planks fixed? Will I see the screws?
faqs.answer: We use a hidden clip system. Stainless steel clips lock the planks together from the sides, so no ugly screws or nails are visible on the top surface.

faqs.question: Do you supply WPC decking for large farmhouse projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier. We offer special project pricing, ready stocks, and expert installation for architects and builders across Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida.

installationSteps.title: Structural Framework Preparation
points: Create a strong base frame using Aluminum or Iron pipes.
Keep a slight slope so that rainwater can drain easily underneath.

installationSteps.title: Fix the First Board
points: Place the first wooden board perfectly straight along the wall.
Secure the starting edge using specialized starter clips.

installationSteps.title: Concealed Clip Locking System
points: Slide the stainless steel clips into the side grooves of the board.
Screw these clips directly into the metal frame for a tight hold.

installationSteps.title: Leave Expansion Gaps
points: Leave a tiny 5mm gap between the ends of the boards.
This allows the floor to safely expand during the hot summer without bending.
